name: IRC_CX_JOBS_QUEUE
description: Stores posting changes to requisitions in Hcm Recruiting

columns.Name: QUEUE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: JOB_PUBLISH_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status indicating if the job posting has been changed or removed. Corresponding lookup is ORA_IRC_CX_JOB_PUBLISH_TYPE

columns.Name: REFERENCE_COUNT
columns.Comments: Value of this column shows that row is already being picked up by a job for publishing, so that no other job pick up the row again for publishing.

columns.Name: RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Value of this column indicates the number of times the publish job has tried to process this row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
